stemHtml: Which of these signals serve as inputs, at a minimum, in the stall warning computers?

options.a: Angle of attack and flaps and spoilers' deflection.
options.b: Angle of attack and flaps and slats deflection.
options.c: Angle of attack, flaps deflection, EPR and N1.
options.d: Angle of attack, flaps deflection and EPR.
